description: NTAG213 card data structure for Wiz Kidz booth games

byteLayout.name: mascotID
byteLayout.description: Mascot identifier (0=Peacock Pride, 1=Orchid Mantis, 2=Red Fox, 3=Green Frog, 4=Yellow Fawn, 5=Blue Jay)

byteLayout.name: uniqueID
byteLayout.description: Unique player identifier (timestamp + random hex), generated at card setup

byteLayout.name: totalPoints
byteLayout.description: Cumulative score across all games for this mascot, updated after each game
